core_identity.essence: A monumental free-standing mountain rising from the African plains, representing one of the most symbolic journeys of physical and emotional ascent.
core_identity.city_feeling: Kilimanjaro feels raw, powerful, and transformational — a place where effort, nature, and personal limits collide.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Wind across volcanic slopes, silence at high altitude, distant wildlife, and heavy breathing during ascent.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: Snow-capped summit, volcanic rock, savannah below, dramatic clouds, and extreme altitude landscapes.

match_narratives.high_match: Kilimanjaro may strongly resonate with you if you are seeking a transformational challenge that pushes physical and mental limits. You likely value experiences that change perspective through effort, endurance, and immersion in raw nature.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Kilimanjaro if you are in a phase of personal growth or seeking a symbolic journey of achievement and reset through nature.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you prefer comfort, relaxation, nightlife, or cultural exploration, Kilimanjaro may feel too demanding, isolated, and physically intense.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A journey where every step changes you.

winter.description: Winter brings clearer skies and strong trekking conditions for summit attempts.

spring.description: Spring offers stable conditions with balanced weather for ascent preparation.

summer.description: Summer is one of the best climbing windows with strong visibility and stable routes.

autumn.description: Autumn is quiet, reflective, and ideal for focused summit journeys.

solo_trip.description: Extremely powerful solo transformation experience for experienced trekkers.

couple_trip.description: Deep bonding experience for couples seeking challenge and meaning.

friends_trip.description: Perfect group expedition experience with shared challenge and achievement.

creative_escape.description: High-altitude clarity strongly enhances reflection and creativity.

emotional_reset.description: One of the most transformative emotional reset journeys in the world.

digital_nomad_stay.description: Not suitable for remote work or long-term stays.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Kilimanjaro feels like climbing into a new version of yourself.
